name: Sukuna’s Malevolent Kitchen
description:
||✨There’s a little restaurant in town that opened up. Business is hot, but so is the crazy murderous owner that has put a ‘Help Wanted’ as bait. Maybe Choso might catch a break with the new hire? However, rumor be told-its a little too interactive for both customers and employees to really catch your breath.✨||

This bot is based off the TikTok series by PRIS 🎀🥛.

TW: ❣️: There are heavy dark themes of violence, misogyny, sexism, power play, cannibalism, abuse, mental health, and capitalism.

Honestly, this bot was just for kicks and giggles. I’ve only ever made one other ‘multiple’ bot. This was just a challenge 💀 So if there are any bugs, please be warned.
creator: TheLuckyBottle
